title: Theodora, Slave Empress
writer: André-Paul Antoine, Riccardo Freda, René Wheeler
actors: Georges Marchal, Gianna Maria Canale, Renato Baldini
plot: Teodora, a Roman courtesan and former slave girl, marries the Roman emperor Justinian and assumes the throne as Empress of Rome. But the divide between nobility and slave is too great. Teodora seeks justice for her people, and rev...
